location.title: Matches work best when we know where you are.
location.subtitle: Allow current location so Fetcht can surface pets around you instead of showing a generic city list.
location.permissionRequired: Location permission is required to discover pets near you.
location.defaultStatus: We use your current location to keep matches nearby and relevant.
location.savingLocation: Saving your location for local matching...
location.needPermission: We still need your location permission before showing nearby matches.

profile.title: Tell us about yourself
profile.subtitle: Other pet parents will see your name and photo.
profile.birthDatePrivacy: Birth date stays private and is used only for age verification.

pets.title: Create a profile pets would actually swipe right on.
pets.subtitle: Set species, breed, hobbies, energy level, and photos in a way that feels easy to scan.
pets.petBioPlaceholder: Tell other pet parents about your pet's personality
pets.photoRequired: Please add at least one pet photo.
pets.fixFields: Please fix the highlighted fields and try again.
pets.validPetAge: Please enter a valid pet age.
pets.petBioMinLength: Pet bio should be at least 12 characters.
pets.selectHobbiesSubtitle: Choose as many hobbies as you want, then tap Done.
pets.selectCharactersSubtitle: Pick traits that best describe your pet's personality.

home.title: Home
home.emptyFeedDescription: Share the first post from your pet world and it will appear here.

match.title: Discover
match.noMatchesDescription: Keep swiping to find the perfect playmate for your pet.

tutorial.welcomeDesc: Find perfect playmates for your pet. Swipe through profiles and discover pets nearby who share your vibe.
tutorial.swipeRightDesc: See a pet you like? Swipe right or tap the heart button. If they like you back, it's a match!
tutorial.swipeLeftDesc: Not the right fit? Swipe left to skip. No worries — there are always more pets to discover.
tutorial.matchChatDesc: When both pets like each other, you get a match! Start a conversation and plan your first meetup.

celebration.matchDescription: {{myPet}} and {{matchedPet}} like each other! Start a conversation now.
celebration.matchDescriptionGeneric: Your pets like each other! Start a conversation now.

petSelect.chooseWhichPet: Choose which pet to discover with

discover.noVenues: No nearby spots or events yet.
discover.addPetFirstCheckIn: Add a pet first to check in.
discover.addPetFirstJoin: Add a pet first to join.
discover.selectAtLeastOnePet: Select at least one pet to check in.

care.title: Care
care.subtitle: Everything your pet needs in one place
care.addPetFirstDescription: Go to Profile and add your first pet to unlock all care features.

profile.title: Profile
profile.noPetsDescription: Add your first pet to unlock discovery, matches, and chat.
profile.addFirstPetDescription: Register your pet to unlock discovery, matching, and all the fun features Fetcht has to offer.

chat.noConversationsDescription: Match with pets and start chatting with their owners.

report.title: Report
report.updated: Your report reason has been updated.

diary.title: Pet Diary
diary.noEntriesDescription: Tap the + button to add your first diary entry for your pet.

feeding.title: Feeding Schedule

health.title: Health Records

weight.title: Weight Tracking
weight.noEntriesDescription: Tap the + button to log your pet's weight.

adoption.title: Adopt
adoption.findFriendDescription: Thousands of pets are waiting for their forever home. Browse profiles, fall in love, and give a pet the life they deserve.
adoption.everyPetDescription: Shelters and pet parents list animals looking for loving families. Each profile includes photos, personality traits, and contact info.
adoption.readyToAdoptDescription: Browse available pets, connect with their current caregivers, and start your adoption journey today.
adoption.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell potential adopters about this pet...
adoption.noListingsDescription: Check back later or create a listing to help a pet find a new home.
adoption.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this listing? This action cannot be undone.
adoption.markAdoptedConfirmMessage: Has this pet been adopted? This will update the listing status.

groups.title: Community Groups
groups.noGroupsDescription: Community groups will appear here as they are created.

playdates.title: Playdates
playdates.noPlaydatesDescription: Tap the + button to organize a playdate for your pets.

vets.title: Nearby Vets
vets.locationNeededDescription: Enable location permissions to find nearby vet clinics.
vets.noClinicsDescription: No veterinary clinics found in your area. Try again later.

petSitters.title: Pet Sitters

petSitters.contactMessage: Hi {{name}}, I found you on Fetcht and would like to inquire about your pet sitting services.

weather.windy: A light walk, but watch for debris.
weather.hot: Keep your pet hydrated, stay in shade.
weather.cold: Bundle up for a short stroll.
